title: matricaria caucasica
intro: Matricaria caucasica, also known as Caucasian chamomile, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family that is native to the Caucasus region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Matricaria caucasica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation. Matricaria caucasica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments, including insomnia, menstrual cramps, and skin irritations.
